intro.label: 1_comfortable.mp4
intro.subtitle: Hi, my name is Emily and today we'll be conducting your job interview together. Please make yourself comfortable.

profanity_warning.label: 14_be_respectful.mp4
profanity_warning.subtitle: Please use respectful language during the interview. Let's return to the interview questions.

finish.label: 30_wonderful_day.mp4
finish.subtitle: Thank you very much for your time today. It was a pleasure speaking with you and we'll be in touch. Have a wonderful day.

english_warning.label: 40_english.mp4
english_warning.subtitle: Oh, would you mind saying it in English?

english_practice.label: 41_english_practice.mp4
english_practice.subtitle: I do understand Spanish, but you are here to practice English language!

off_topic_1.label: 42_off_topic_1.mp4
off_topic_1.subtitle: We can come back later to that topic. For now, let's focus on the main objective, please.

off_topic_2.label: 43_off_topic_2.mp4
off_topic_2.subtitle: That's an interesting topic. Yet, we are here to develop your English skills in a context of a job interview.

interview.title: Emily Interview Coach - Prototype 1
interview.description: A one-question interview prototype for testing JSON flow and JavaScript logic.

video.label: 2_interested_in.mp4
video.subtitle: What is the position you are interested in?

questions.prompt: What is the position you are interested in?

studentInput.placeholder: Write your answer here. Example: I am interested in the position of sales assistant.

onLimitReached.message: You have reached the repeat limit for this question. Please use the subtitles button if you need support. Let’s continue with the interview.

humanInterfaceInstructions.whereToPlaceFile: Create a new file named interview-flow.json in the same folder as index.html, style.css, and script.js.
humanInterfaceInstructions.scriptConnection: In script.js, load this JSON file using fetch('interview-flow.json'). The JavaScript should read the video URLs, subtitles, repeat limit, question prompt, and feedbackMap from this file instead of hard-coding them directly into the script.
humanInterfaceInstructions.htmlRequirement: Make sure index.html includes the JavaScript file at the bottom of the body section using: <script src="script.js"></script>
humanInterfaceInstructions.importantNote: Do not place this JSON inside the HTML file. Keep it as a separate file so the interview flow can be expanded later without rewriting the full interface.
